bibliographic_info.title: Single-station-augmented PPP-B2b considering the satellite-specific clock bias via short-message communication

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  JournalofGeodesy(2025)99:42 https://doi.org/10.1007/s00190-025-01965-3 ORIGINAL ARTICLE Single-station-augmented PPP-B2b considering the satellite-specific clock bias via short-message communication Haijun Yuan1·Zhetao Zhang1 ·Xiufeng He1·Hao Wang1 Received:11September2024/Accepted:14April2025/Publishedonline:26May2025 ©Springer-VerlagGmbHGermany,partofSpringerNature2025 Abstract
In this paper, a single-station- augmented PPP-B2b considering the SCB via BDS-3 short-message communication (SMC) is proposed.
